function.rulebook_notes: Bootstrapped with tree/read/context; read nested AGENTS.MD files before entering folders; used canonical cast records for birthday authority.
function.outcome_justification: Using context date 2026-03-02 and birthday data in canonical cast files, the nearest upcoming birthday month-day is 04-04. Search showed only 10_entities/cast/petra.md on that date, and that file’s header gives the exact name Petra Novak.
